statement: A preregistered observation instrument distinguishes a prescribed controlled census of coherent, transport-broken, and HTTP-200 semantically incompatible artifact delivery by classifying the three arms respectively as PASS, TRANSPORT_FAILURE, and BEHAVIOR_FAILURE without post-observation adjustment
falsification_criteria: If any completed prescribed arm is classified differently from its frozen expected classification, the instrument Claim is falsified.

If the run cannot seal exactly three complete samples under the frozen schedule, identity, atomicity, and lossless-retention rules, the instrument Claim receives no support and the study disposition is ABORTED_INSTRUMENT.
If any prospective subject is accessed before the protocol-entry gate, the study is INVALID_CONTAMINATED, emits zero Evidence, and cannot support this Claim.
